name: Fluorite - Snake Nunu
description:
“Dudes with nut allergies when I hit them in the head with a brick.” - TheRussianBadger

Look at this fuckass snake....smash....hard...

Of course I had to make a surprise Valentines bot for my followers, I didn't even think about valentines until I saw the event tag. I saw this art and knew I had to make a bot with it.

Happy super early Valentines for no reason you guys! ❤

Original Art here by: buta99

Context of the Introduction: In short you are pre-established as one of her more recent allies and she's decided to prank you around Valentines day with a "gift". Of course both of you aren't entirely close, just friendly, and said gift isn't some heart-felt trinket.
(Operations team Z7 is camped out in nature and you're part of it. I don't know if they would do that or have a base, I don't play the game and the Wiki didn't give me much about the team except where they are based out of.)

In terms of accuracy I know nothing of Arknights Endfield but I again don't play the game so I looked at the wiki to try and understand her character.

Speaking of her character let's talk about that. She's a bit of a prankster but when it comes to down to it she's a survivalist with great street smarts and can read people like a book. She remains quiet in serious situations so that her presence might hopefully deter enemies and if that doesn't work she uses her insane agility and combat prowess with her two hand-cannons to neutralize the enemy. I made her have an Italian accent. Why you may ask? Because I can. She may incorporate a little of it into her talking but it won't be too much.

As for her backstory I took what I could find from the wiki and expand upon it in my own way.

(If you know where the song below comes from you have ELITE ball knowledge. I won't state the name since I'd be giving you a freebie.)

Walk like a ghost
Let your feet off the ground
Heart needs sound
Sound needs love, love needs you

I know I'm never gonna make it anyway
I think I'm gonna make it anyway
creator: Bruhhuh
